title: coaching — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by CoachingServiceProvider::boot(). Used by both observers + FormRequest data classes.

rules.name: valid_primary_sport
rules.description: Refuses primary_sport_id that does not resolve to an is_active=true row in sports_registry.sports.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must reference an active sport in the registry.

rules.name: valid_coaching_since_year
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a year between 1900 and the current year.

rules.name: valid_photo_url
rules.description: Refuses non-HTTPS S3 URLs. Matches pattern `https://[a-z0-9.\-]+\.s3(\.[\w\-]+)*\.amazonaws\.com/.+` (or the tenant's configured S3-compatible endpoint per `coaching.storage.photo_endpoints`).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be an HTTPS S3 URL.

rules.name: valid_availability_shape
rules.description: Refuses availability payloads that don't match the day-of-week map schema: object with keys IN {monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday, sunday}, each value is an array of {start_hhmm, end_hhmm} pairs where start < end. Strict mode (per config) requires every day-of-week key.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a day-of-week availability map with valid time ranges.

rules.name: valid_hourly_rate_currency_pair
rules.description: Cross-field validation: refuses when hourly_rate_cents XOR rate_currency is set. Both must be null OR both must be non-null.
rules.default_message: hourly_rate_cents and rate_currency must both be set or both null.

rules.name: valid_specializations_shape
rules.description: Refuses specializations arrays containing entries not in the specializations-catalog (data/specializations-catalog.json).
rules.default_message: One or more specializations are not in the catalog.

rules.name: valid_languages
rules.description: Refuses languages_spoken arrays containing entries that are not valid ISO 639-1 two-letter codes.
rules.default_message: One or more language codes are not valid ISO 639-1.

rules.name: valid_role
rules.description: Refuses role values outside: head_coach / assistant_coach / observer / substitute.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid coach-assignment role.

rules.name: valid_ratable_type_for_rating
rules.description: Refuses ratable_type outside: Sport / Discipline / Position. Also verifies the referenced ratable_id resolves + is_active=true in the corresponding registry table.
rules.default_message: The rating must target an active Sport, Discipline, or Position.

rules.name: valid_rating_value_for_scale
rules.description: Cross-field: refuses when rating_value is not in 1..5 (both stars_1_5 + level_5_stage encode 1-5).

rules.name: unique_active_certification_per_body_and_name
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (tenant_id, coaching_profile_id, issuing_body, certification_name, issued_at, deleted_at IS NULL).
rules.default_message: This certification (issuing body + name + issued date) already exists for this coach.

rules.name: unique_head_coach_per_assignable
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (tenant_id, assignable_type, assignable_id, role='head_coach', deleted_at IS NULL, end_date IS NULL OR end_date > NOW()).
rules.default_message: Another coach is already the head_coach for this session/team/event.

rules.name: unique_coaching_profile_per_staff
rules.description: Enforces the partial unique index (tenant_id, staff_id, deleted_at IS NULL).
rules.default_message: This Staff already has an active coaching profile.

rules.name: no_self_rating
rules.description: Refuses when rated_by_user_id resolves to the same Staff as the coaching_profile.staff_id (i.e. the rater is the coach being rated).
rules.default_message: You cannot rate your own coaching profile.
